ValidationRule.description: User must enter a cancellation reason before going to status Ready
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, RecordType.DeveloperName ="Cancellation", ISBLANK(CancellationReason__c), OR( ISPICKVAL(InvoiceStatus__c,"Ready"), ISPICKVAL(InvoiceStatus__c,"Sent") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You must add a Cancellation Reason. (IN020)
